data.body: PR opened: https://github.com/navapbc/oscer/pull/665 (Resolves #663). Implemented with Pagy (25/page), newest-first ordering with id tiebreaker on the open tab, paginate-before-hydrate, reusable USWDS shared/_pagination partial. Full suite green (2209 ex, 0 failures), browser-verified. es-US omitted (app not yet localized). Fast-follow: (status, created_at) index for deep-page/COUNT cost on large regions.
